ordinary_no_progress_guard.fingerprint: ordinary|available help: - ask directly: “fix x”, “review this pr”, “analyze why y fails”, “add tests for z”. - workflow shortcuts: - `$analyze` read-only repo investigation - `$plan` or `$ralplan` implementation planning - `$code-review` bug/risk-focused review - `$ultraqa` adversarial qa workflow - `$skill` manage local skills - `$cancel` stop active omx mode current session constraints: filesystem is read-only and approvals are disabled, so i can inspect, analyze, and advise, but i cannot modify files unless the environment permissions change. this surface is outside tmux, so omx runtime ui commands like `omx team`, `omx hud`, and `omx question` are not directly available here.
